overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character traverses a neon-lit urban street, passes beneath an industrial overpass, and continues along the sidewalk amidst towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban boulevard with holographic advertisements

events.description: character turns left toward the underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing the neon-lit cityscape and towering mega-buildings

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying 'NIGHT CITY' in cyan text
tall cylindrical industrial tower with illuminated '07' signage
cluster of high-rise buildings covered in colorful vertical neon advertisements
modern street light with horizontal LED bar

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide futuristic sidewalk at dusk, surrounded by towering mega-structures covered in holographic advertisements. The iconic 'NIGHT CITY' billboard glows on the right while the massive Building 07 dominates the left skyline. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

events.description: moves from open street into covered underpass beneath highway overpass
ambient light drops significantly entering the shadowed underpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete underpass with industrial pillars

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with metal support beams overhead
thick industrial support columns lining the walkway
weathered concrete structure with metal fencing and industrial equipment

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a shadowed underpass beneath an elevated highway. The environment shifts from neon-lit openness to a darker, industrial corridor with massive concrete pillars and overhead metal infrastructure. The lighting becomes significantly dimmer as natural sky visibility is blocked by the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with convenience store and mixed retail

events.description: exits underpass back onto open street with visible sky and neon signage
lighting brightens as character returns to mixed natural dusk and artificial neon illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the illuminated 24/7 billboard in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the distance along the same sidewalk

entered.detail: large yellow and blue holographic billboard displaying '24/7' and 'SUPER SALE' text
low-rise commercial structures with various neon signs and storefronts
metal safety barrier separating sidewalk from lower elevation

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the character returns to the open street where the prominent yellow '24/7' billboard dominates the view ahead. The sidewalk runs parallel to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic, bordered by commercial buildings with various neon advertisements. The character continues walking toward the billboard as it gradually moves closer from the far distance to mid-range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that dips into a shadowed industrial underpass before returning to the open city street. It begins on a wide futuristic sidewalk at dusk, moving past towering mega-structures and a glowing Night City billboard under the massive silhouette of Building 07. As the character turns left, the scene shifts from the vibrant openness of the skyline into a dim, concrete underpass characterized by heavy metal infrastructure and massive pillars. The camera then emerges from the darkness back into the evening light, where the environment expands once more to reveal a multi-lane road bordered by commercial buildings. Finally, the view centers on a prominent yellow 24/7 billboard that grows larger and more dominant as the character continues their forward progression.
